attempts.strategy: Decompose absoluteCohomologyZeroAddEquiv = (AddEquiv from Ext.homEquiv₀).trans (jShriekOU_homEquiv U F) and prove naturality of each layer separately
attempts.code_tried: private lemmas homEquiv₀_comp_mk₀, freeYonedaHomEquiv_naturality, sheafificationHomAddEquiv_naturality, jShriekOU_homEquiv_naturality; final assembly via `change` to unfolded composite + two `rw`s + `rfl`
attempts.insight: toPresheafOfModules X is DEFINITIONALLY the right-adjoint composite SheafOfModules.forget ⋙ restrictScalars (𝟙 _) (verified by rfl), which makes Adjunction.homEquiv_naturality_right of sheafificationAdjunction directly applicable. Carriers F.obj (op U) and F.presheaf.obj (op U) are defeq so plain `rfl` folds them — no erw gymnastics needed.

next_steps: Bottom arrow g_U = ConcreteCategory.hom (((toPresheafOfModules X).map g).app (op U)); since absoluteCohomologyZeroAddEquiv is an AddEquiv, surjectivity of g_U ⇒ surjectivity of H⁰(U,g). This is the surjectivity-transfer input for L3 (absoluteCohomology_one_eq_zero_of_basis), now unblocked.

attempts.strategy: Reduce SES of section-Čech complexes to degreewise short-exactness; each degree is defeq to the Pi.map short complex of faceShortComplex, closed by the AB4* keystone shortExact_piMap
attempts.insight: Cover-local, presheaf-level form (U : ι → Opens X; P : ShortComplex X.PresheafOfModules; per-face hypothesis hface) — strictly more general than the cover-global (B,Cov)/sheaf blueprint sketch. Epi (Pi.map φ) is NOT inferInstance in Ab (only Mono is); shortExact_piMap proves it elementwise via AddCommGrpCat.epi_iff_surjective + Concrete.productEquiv.

next_steps: Per-face SES derivation feeds hface at instantiation: for a sheaf SES S with S.ShortExact, faceShortComplex (coverOpen 𝒰) (S.map toPresheafOfModules) σ is ShortExact — mono+middle-exactness from sections left-exactness (toPresheafOfModules right adjoint ⇒ PreservesFiniteLimits), epi from ses_cech_h1. Independent of L3/L4.

attempts.strategy: Build abstract homological core cechHomology_quotient_vanishing (SES of cochain complexes, X₂ and X₁ vanish in positive homology ⇒ X₃ vanishes via δIso dimension shift Hᵖ(X₃) ≅ Hᵖ⁺¹(X₁)=0), then apply at sectionCechComplexShortComplex as a defeq wrapper
attempts.code_tried: cechHomology_quotient_vanishing applied at sectionCechComplexShortComplex U P; T.Xₖ.homology p ≙ cechCohomology U P.Xₖ p by defeq
attempts.insight: Cover-local form takes hSES (L1 output) + explicit vanishing hyps hI/hF in cechCohomology terms rather than 'I injective' (hI comes from injective_cech_acyclic at instantiation). cechCohomology accessor (= (sectionCechComplex U F).homology p) added this iter — the effort-breaker's flagged naming item, now exists.

next_steps: L3 (absoluteCohomology_one_eq_zero_of_basis): uses absoluteCohomology_covariant_exact₁/₃ + the surjectivity transfer from absoluteCohomologyZeroAddEquiv_naturality. L4 + top: induction over the abstract HasVanishingHigherCech class using L2 for closure-under-quotient and L3 for the base case.
